message:
feat(tui): add incident workflow shortcuts with playbook overlay (bd-xzt.3.9)

Introduce severity-aware incident shortcuts for rapid triage during disk
pressure events. Adds incident.rs module with severity classification,
7-entry playbook, context-aware hints, and alert banners. Integrates with
existing input/update/model layers via IncidentPlaybook overlay, `!` and
`x` global shortcuts, and 3 new command palette actions.

29 tests for incident module, all existing tests updated and passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
